publicSideBand: GCWW says it pays 100 percent of replacement costs with participation in the program
privateSideBand: GCWW says it pays 100 percent of replacement costs with participation in the program
fullReplacementBand: GCWW says it pays 100 percent of all replacement costs for participating properties
housingTypeAssumption: GCWW program language states full coverage rather than a bid range
permitAssumption: Participation depends on GCWW program triggers and property eligibility
restorationAssumption: GCWW states restoration work is completed after replacement
methodologySummary: GCWW does not publish a local bid range; it publishes a utility-run program where replacement and restoration costs are carried by GCWW for properties that enter the official participation workflow.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners avoid direct cost only when the address enters one of GCWW's replacement triggers such as child care facilities leaks water-main work elevated lead results or targeted-area prioritization.
